/usr/bin/c++  -arch arm64 -dynamiclib -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names -o libFast.dylib -install_name @rpath/libFast.dylib CMakeFiles/Fast.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Fast.dir/src/draw.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Fast.dir/src/TinyerFont/Tinyerfont.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Fast.dir/__/Arduboy2Playdate/Arduboy2.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Fast.dir/__/Arduboy2Playdate/Arduboy2Audio.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Fast.dir/__/Arduboy2Playdate/Arduboy2Beep.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Fast.dir/__/Arduboy2Playdate/Arduboy2Common.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Fast.dir/__/Arduboy2Playdate/Arduboy2Core.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Fast.dir/__/Arduboy2Playdate/Arduboy2Data.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Fast.dir/__/Arduboy2Playdate/Sprites.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Fast.dir/__/Arduboy2Playdate/SpritesB.cpp.o  ../playdate-cpp/libpdcpp_core.a ../playdate-cpp/libpdcpp_core.a ../playdate-cpp/libplaydate_sdk.a
